overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with pink hair exploring a dimly lit underground casino. The environment features industrial concrete architecture with vibrant purple and teal neon lighting, slot machines, roulette tables, and numerous NPCs gambling. The character walks through the space from the entrance past gambling tables to a back locker area.

events.description: character enters through St. Aubin doorway from exterior into the casino

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance corridor, passing slot machines mounted along the right wall

entered.detail: doorway with illuminated 'St. Aubin' signage above, marking the entrance
line of illuminated slot machines with glowing screens along the right wall
screen displaying political advertisement with 'VOTE' text visible
continuous purple neon strips running along the ceiling providing ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character entering a narrow corridor marked by the 'St. Aubin' doorway. The space features industrial concrete walls and floors, illuminated by purple neon ceiling strips. A row of slot machines lines the right wall while a wall-mounted TV screen displays advertisements on the left. The character walks forward through this sparse entrance area toward the main casino floor.

events.description: space opens up to reveal the first roulette table with a dealer and neon underlighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the roulette table, then moving past it toward the main floor

notable_agents.action: casino dealer standing behind the roulette table, managing the game

entered.detail: large curved roulette table with green felt surface and illuminated betting layout
teal and orange neon lighting underneath the table edge
black metal chain-link fencing dividing sections of the casino

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main gambling area where a large roulette table dominates the center space, illuminated by vibrant teal and orange neon underlighting. A dealer stands behind the table managing the game. The character pauses briefly to observe before continuing past metal mesh partitions that divide the casino sections. The slot machines that were on the right are now visible on the left as the character moves deeper into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main casino floor with multiple gaming tables

events.description: crowd density increases significantly as the character enters the busy main gambling floor
character navigates through dense crowd, moving between roulette tables

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded casino floor, weaving between multiple roulette tables and groups of gamblers

notable_agents.action: group of gamblers gathered around a roulette table, placing bets and watching the wheel

entered.detail: several illuminated roulette tables arranged throughout the open floor space
large wall mural with stylized text and graphics on the back wall of the casino
metal railing of an upper level overlooking the main casino floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters the bustling main casino floor where the space opens up to accommodate multiple roulette tables and dense crowds of gamblers. The atmosphere is thick with smoke and illuminated by purple ambient lighting. A large graffiti mural covers the back wall, and an upper balcony level is visible. The character carefully navigates through the standing crowds, weaving between the active gaming tables where patrons are intensely focused on their bets.

events.description: character moves from the crowded casino floor into a quieter back area with industrial elements

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back corner of the establishment, approaching the locker storage area

entered.detail: illuminated arcade cabinet with 'TRAUMA DRAMA' signage glowing in red and white
rows of white metal storage lockers against the back wall
exposed ventilation pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
brown leather sofa with visible wear, positioned against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a quieter back area of the casino, transitioning from the crowded gaming floor to a more industrial storage space. A 'Trauma Drama' arcade machine glows on the right, while banks of metal lockers line the back wall. The space features exposed industrial piping on the ceiling, a worn leather sofa, and concrete flooring. The crowd and gambling tables are left behind as the character explores this utilitarian back corner of the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow industrial entrance through a bustling neon-lit casino and into a quiet, utilitarian storage area. It begins as the character enters a sparse concrete corridor marked by the St. Aubin doorway, moving past purple neon strips and slot machines toward the main floor. As the space opens up, the camera glides past a teal and orange illuminated roulette table and through metal mesh partitions, eventually merging into a crowded gaming hall thick with smoke and purple ambient light. The scene then shifts from the intensity of the gambling crowds and a large graffiti mural toward a more secluded back area. Finally, the atmosphere turns industrial and quiet as the character leaves the tables behind to explore a corner featuring a glowing arcade machine, exposed ceiling pipes, and banks of metal lockers.
